info.title: Email Health API
info.description: Email Health API. Validate email addresses, check breach status, and score deliverability. Send a JSON POST request through api.market and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, and authentication are handled by api.market plans.

post.description: Validate email addresses, check breach status, and score deliverability.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.
